step_rationale: Implicated in atherosclerosis plaque progression; lipid/inflammatory context.
mechanism: SGPP2 regulates sphingosine-1-phosphate signaling, affecting lipid metabolism and plaque-cell activation during atherosclerotic progression.

references.title: Identification of Key Genes as Early Warning Signals of Acute Myocardial Infarction Based on Weighted Gene Correlation Network Analysis and Dynamic Network Biomarker Algorithm.
